title: 1277. Count Square Submatrices with All Ones
description: Given a m * n matrix of ones and zeros, return how many square submatrices have all ones.

examples.explanation: There are 10 squares of side 1. There are 4 squares of side 2. There is  1 square of side 3. Total number of squares = 10 + 4 + 1 = 15.
There are 6 squares of side 1. There is 1 square of side 2. Total number of squares = 6 + 1 = 7.
